title: CheckMate
subtitle: AI-Powered News Analysis Tool. Awarded 1st place in the Cloud Native Experience Award hosted by Dell Technologies.
role: Frontend Software Engineer (IS483 Final Year Group Project)
award: Cloud Native Experience Award - Dell Technologies

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.body: CheckMate is an AI-powered news analysis platform that helps users evaluate news sentiments, detect propaganda techniques, and understand article tones quickly through multiple intuitive interfaces.

highlights: Engineered a high-performance React frontend featuring route-based lazy loading and client-side API response caching to ensure smooth user experience during real-time machine learning inference and sentiment analysis

Bridged design and development by translating high-fidelity Figma prototypes into a fully responsive web application, Chrome extension and Telegram bot interface, maintaining a consistent component library and Tailwind CSS utility patterns across three distinct platforms
Validated product-market fit through Maze testing with 30 institutional participants, iterating on interaction flows to achieve a 0% task drop-off rate and 80% user satisfaction score
Facilitated cross-platform feature delivery by collaborating with Python/ML engineers to define API payload structures for Hugging Face models
